Localization.Description: Password spraying in Aria Operations for Logs. Password spraying is a type of brute-force attack in which an attacker tries the most popular passwords sequentially for each user, which helps avoid blocking the accounts of the attacked users.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Password spraying attempts on Aria Operations for Logs host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {count.subevents}.
Password spraying on Aria Operations for Logs host {event_src.host}. The password of user {subject.account.name} is bruteforced. Number of failed login attempts: {count.subevents}.
Password spraying on Aria Operations for Logs host {event_src.host}. The passwords of users {datafield2} are bruteforced. Number of failed login attempts: {count.subevents}.
